iterations.theme: Building and Scaling Opal: From Paid Ads to Freemium and Beyond, Driven by AB Testing
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, from introduction to conclusion, as the total duration fits within the specified range for a single block. All major themes are interconnected and flow logically.
